case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. RECENE LACHELLE SCARBOROUGH

docket_entries.description: MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-02-2020 VACATED. DISMISSAL OF COMPLAINT/ENTIRE ACTION FILED 06/26/20. (206)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200003207), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED NOV-23-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCARBOROUGH, RECENE LACHELLE

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-29-2020 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RACENE SCARBOROUGH'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED IN PART & GRANTED IN PART THE APPLICATION. THE COURT PARTIALLY GRANTED THE WAIVER AS TO THE FIRST APPEARANCE FILING FEE ONLY AND APPLICANT MUST PAY ALL OTHER COURT FEES AND COSTS. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206/GLW)
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 64755639): ESPADA, LISA J SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR SCARBOROUGH, RACENE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SCARBOROUGH, RECENE LACHELLE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-18-2020
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SCARBOROUGH, RACENE

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 (**PARTIALLY GRANTED AS TO WAIVER OF FILING FEE FOR FIRST APPEARANCE ONLY. DEFENDANT MUST PAY ALL OTHER COURT FEES.**) AS TO DEFENDANT SCARBOROUGH, RACENE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-08-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-02-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-08-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100105257)
